description: Plugin-distributed hooks for trust-and-safety. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks when the plugin is installed. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the plugin's install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: flags 2 mechanically-detectable Trust & Safety smells in policy/detection files (.md/.py/.yaml/.yml/.json) — (1) an enforcement action (remove/suspend/ban/limit) with no appeal/contest path mentioned, (2) a classifier threshold/cutoff with no precision or recall noted. Set TS_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
